narrative:
Lawrence County has 38,861 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.6% of registrants.
